center.name: Imperial Valley
center.summary: Imperial Valley是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Mountain plover，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: About 85 percent of the population winters in the San Joaquin and Imperial Valleys in California

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: About 85 percent of the population winters in the San Joaquin and Imperial Valleys in California
